products.title: La Beauté Electric Facial Massage Tool
products.canonicalAssetFolder: /Users/mariabotcheliouk/Documents/SkinGenie/demo-site/assets_v3 + /Volumes/Maria's Storage Mac/Electric Gua Sha January photoshoot
products.claimBoundary: Cosmetic facial massage and beauty-routine language only; keep wording tactile, practical and non-results-led.
products.headline: A polished facial ritual, in one rechargeable tool.
products.description: Gentle vibration, warming feel and cooling feel give your routine a quiet spa-like moment at home. Use with facial oil or moisturizer for comfortable glide.
bullets: Includes stand, pouch, cable and manual
routine: Apply facial oil or moisturizer for glide.
Choose the mode that feels best for your routine.
Move slowly along the cheeks, forehead and jaw area with light pressure.
Wipe clean and store on the stand.
faq: Can I use it with serum?
Yes. Use it with a facial oil, serum or moisturizer so the tool glides comfortably.
What does EMS mode feel like?
A light pulsing sensation. Start low and stop if the sensation feels uncomfortable.
Wipe the metal surface with a soft damp cloth after each use and let it dry before storing.

seo.title: La Beauté Electric Facial Massage Tool | Skin Genie
seo.description: Shop Skin Genie La Beauté, a rechargeable electric facial massage tool for a relaxed at-home beauty ritual.

products.title: Skin Genie Derma Roller 0.5mm
products.claimBoundary: Use restrained cosmetic routine language only. Keep wording practical, hygiene-led and non-results-led.
products.headline: A gentle-looking starter roller for a careful evening routine.
products.description: A blue-and-white cosmetic roller with protective case and instruction-led support. Keep the page practical, clean and safety-first.
routine: Sanitize the roller before and after use.
Use light pressure and avoid irritated or broken skin.
Let the roller dry completely before storing.
faq: Yes. The 0.5mm page is positioned as the gentler starter option within the Skin Genie roller line.
Can I use it every day?
Follow the product instructions and keep use conservative. Do not use on irritated or broken skin.
Clean it, let it air dry, then place it back in the protective case.

seo.title: Skin Genie Derma Roller 0.5mm | Cosmetic Roller
seo.description: Shop the Skin Genie 0.5mm derma roller, a blue-and-white cosmetic roller with protective case and instruction-led support.

products.title: Skin Genie Gold Derma Roller 1.5mm
products.claimBoundary: High-risk product: minimal beauty-tool wording only. Do not use blue/white MTS assets; keep copy practical and non-results-led.
products.headline: The black-and-gold roller, clearly separated from the blue starter SKU.
products.description: A gold-tone cosmetic roller for experienced beauty-tool users who want a premium-looking routine piece with clear storage and care guidance.
routine: Read the full instructions before first use.
Sanitize before and after every session.
Use light pressure and avoid sensitive, irritated or broken skin.
Clean, air dry and store in the case.
faq: Yes. This page uses the black-and-gold Gold Roller asset set only.
Is it the same as the blue 1.5mm MTS folder?
No. Blue/white MTS images are rejected for this page to avoid another product mismatch.
It is positioned for experienced cosmetic-tool users who understand careful hygiene and storage.
